emails.subject: RE: LaRence Snowden
emails.body: RE: LaRence Snowden Slight interest; could see as a fit in Risk or Strucuturing. EGM has no immediate openings in either but I am always open to the possibility of going long people in those areas. He was supposed to get back to me if he had interest in EGM have not heard from him yet.
